metrics.title: What Problem Is Nasun Solving?
metrics.intro: By 2026, crypto will no longer be niche.
metrics.conclusion1: Hundreds of millions of people touch crypto, but only a small minority experience it as something more than speculation.
metrics.conclusion2: The problem Nasun addresses is not awareness — it is relevance.

thesis.title:
Nasun's Thesis:
Consensus Through Shared Creation
thesis.intro: The strongest communities in history formed not by incentives alone, but by shared stories. Stories align individuals, give meaning to participation, and create cultural gravity that retains contributors.

enables.intro: Nasun enables communities to collaborate transparently using Web3, AI, and social platforms to build products people care about:
items: Entertainment that communities are proud to support and share
Financial products that expand real economic autonomy
Games prioritizing creativity and fun over extraction

thesis.goal: The goal is not to maximize engagement metrics, but to cultivate authentic participation driven by shared purpose.

pipeline.title: Coordination Pipeline
pipeline.intro: Nasun treats onchain consensus as the final step in a broader coordination process rather than the starting point.

steps.title: Information & Signal Aggregation
steps.description: AI systems and open data sources assist in aggregating information and identifying discussion themes that demonstrate sustained engagement or relevance across social and community channels.

steps.title: Open Collaboration
steps.description: Discussion and creative development occur across public platforms, with ideas evolving through community participation and feedback.

steps.title: Proposal Formation
steps.description: High-signal discussion outcomes are summarized, refined, and structured into actionable proposals, with AI-assisted tooling supporting synthesis while preserving human authorship and review.

steps.title: Onchain Execution
steps.description: Final decisions are expressed through Nasun's execution layer, where outcomes become verifiable, enforceable, and transparent.

pipeline.conclusion: By separating signal discovery, collaboration, and execution, Nasun enables scalable coordination while maintaining decentralized control and accountability.

section1.title: The Core Problem
section1.subtitle: Creation Has Exploded. Value Has Not.
section1.p1: AI tools and social platforms allow millions to create instantly.
section1.box3: Platforms extract while creators get scraps.
section1.p4: Without continuity, there is no compounding value.
section1.p5: Communities need a way to build intellectual property together and share in its long-term success.

section2.title: The Nasun Framework
section2.intro: Nasun treats on-chain execution as the final step, not the starting point.
section2.collaborateDesc: Open creative iteration where anyone can contribute ideas or improvements.
section2.proposeDesc: Refined ideas are formalized with clear scope, contributors, and resource requirements.
section2.voteDesc: The community decides what gets built and funded.
section2.executeDesc: Approved proposals are executed with transparent treasury flows and contributor attribution recorded on-chain.

section3.title: The Network as Economic Backbone
section3.conclusion: When an IP generates revenue, through a game, film, AI platform, or financial application, net revenue flows back to the projects and treasury.

section4.title: Built by Creators, Not Just Engineers
section4.intro: Nasun began in production, not speculation.
section4.naru: Head editor and producer on Korean films premiering at Cannes, Berlin, and Venice.
section4.overclocked: 20+ years in media production. Built Gen Sol multiplayer alpha in UE5 (C++).
section4.conclusion: Nasun exists because existing platforms failed to coordinate both.

section6.title: Why Now: The Relevance Era
section6.p1: AI is flooding the world with content.
section6.p2: Crypto has onboarded millions, but relevance remains shallow.
section6.p3: The next era will not be defined by speculation or infinite content.
section6.p4: It will be defined by systems that allow communities to:
section6.conclusion: Nasun is the infrastructure that makes this coordination technically possible and economically sustainable.

pageTitle.line2: for the Next Era of Creation

section1.title: 1. The Core Challenge: Creation Without Value Accrual
content: We live in an age of unprecedented creation.

AI tools, social platforms, and global connectivity allow millions of people to create, share, and collaborate instantly. Yet despite this explosion of activity, very little lasting value is being created, economically, culturally, or socially.
Stories, worlds, and ideas are launched every day, but most vanish as quickly as they appear.

box.item1: <0>The Attention Trap:</0> Content is produced, consumed, and forgotten in seconds.
box.item2: <0>The Meaning Gap:</0> AI makes content infinite, but meaning and value increasingly scarce.
box.item3: <0>The Extraction Model:</0> Creators, fans, and professionals pour energy into platforms, but rarely share in long-term ownership or outcomes.

conclusion.line4: What’s missing is a way for global communities to build enduring intellectual property together and to share in the value as those worlds grow into games, films, applications, and financial systems.

section2.title: 2. Our Solution: The Nasun Framework
intro: Nasun is a platform for coordinated creation at global scale.
We treat technology, AI, social media, and Web3, as a unified stack designed to guide a project from a spark of an idea to a living, global IP.
Rather than optimizing for empty views or speculation, Nasun is built to help communities create meaningful work together and ensure that ownership and value flow back to the community.

box1.title: Turning Fleeting Energy into Persistent Value
content: Today, creative energy is scattered across feeds, chats, and platforms.

Nasun provides a framework where creators, fans, and professionals collaborate around shared IPs designed to evolve over time. Every contribution, creative, technical, or financial, builds toward something that lasts.
Whether it’s an expansive science-fiction universe like Gen Sol or a unified financial rail like Pado, contributions are not lost to the feed. They compound.
When an IP succeeds, the people who helped build it share in that success.

box2.title: The Network as an Economic Backbone
content: To support this kind of collaboration, ownership must be clear, composable, and enforceable.

The Nasun Network serves as the economic backbone for shared creation. Built using the Move programming language, it allows us to track contributions, attribution, and ownership at a granular level across creative and financial work alike.
When an IP succeeds through a game release, film, or financial service, value flows transparently back to the community that created it, not to a centralized intermediary.
Blockchain infrastructure exists here for one reason: to make shared ownership real.

box3.title: A Seamless, Human-First Experience
box3.intro: We believe technology should feel invisible.
box3.p2: Participants engage through stories, culture, and familiar platforms, while the underlying systems quietly handle coordination, attribution, and value flow.
list: <0>Social Media</0> acts as our discovery and cultural engine
<0>The Nasun Network</0> serves as the shared vault and consensus layer
box3.conclusion: The result is an experience that feels natural to creators and fans alike, while remaining transparent and fair beneath the surface.

section3.title: 3. Built by Creators, Not Just Engineers
content: Nasun did not begin as a technical experiment.
It grew out of real production work, on film sets, in editing rooms, and inside studios where stories are refined, teams are aligned, and finished work must meet professional standards.

Our founders bring a rare combination of cinematic storytelling and systems engineering. Our lead, Naru, is a professional filmmaker who has served as head editor and producer on seminal South Korean films recognized at Cannes, Berlin, and Venice. Our ecosystem lead, Overclocked, brings over 20 years of experience in media production and hands-on Unreal Engine 5 development.
We’ve lived the challenges of creative production firsthand: managing complexity, coordinating contributors, protecting creative intent, and delivering real outcomes.
Nasun exists because existing systems failed to support this work at scale.

section4.title: 4. The Coordination Pipeline: From Signal to Consensus
section4.intro: Nasun treats on-chain consensus as the final step in a broader human process, not the starting point.

box1.title: 1. Signal Aggregation
box1.content: AI systems assist in identifying ideas, themes, and creative directions that show sustained resonance across the community.

box2.title: 2. Open Collaboration
box2.content: Creative development unfolds in public, with ideas evolving through discussion, experimentation, and feedback.

box3.title: 3. Proposal Formation
box3.content: High-signal outcomes are refined into actionable proposals, supported by AI-assisted synthesis while preserving human authorship and review.

box4.title: 4. On-Chain Execution
box4.content: Final decisions are executed through the Nasun layer, making outcomes verifiable, enforceable, and transparent.

section4.conclusion: By separating discovery, collaboration, and execution, Nasun enables coordination at scale without sacrificing decentralization or accountability.

section5.title: 5. Why Now: The Relevance Era
content: By the end of 2025, hundreds of millions of people will hold digital assets. Yet most experience crypto only as speculation.
The problem is not awareness.<1/>It is <0>relevance</0>.
As AI accelerates creation and power centralizes across platforms, communities need systems that allow them to create, decide, and own together, visibly and credibly.
Nasun is not focused on launching hundreds of disposable applications. We are building a small number of world-class experiences that invite participation, reward contribution, and endure.
The strongest communities in history were formed by shared stories and shared work.
Nasun is the infrastructure that allows the next ones to be built, together, in public, and with ownership that lasts.
